title: God's Time Must End Our Trouble.
content:
God doth not promise here to man that He
    Will free him quickly from his misery;
    But in His own time, and when He thinks fit,
    Then He will give a happy end to it.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "God's Time Must End Our Trouble.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
